introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Component
introduced_concepts.definition: A component representing additive genetic contribution in the model.

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The numerical value of the phenotype or quantitative trait being modeled.

introduced_concepts.name: Imath-bar
introduced_concepts.definition: Imath-bar names the biological object or model condition being used in this formula.

introduced_concepts.name: Sigma Power 2(e)
introduced_concepts.definition: Sigma Power 2(e) describes spread or joint movement among variables.

introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
